text.message: I’ll trade if you agree not to plow ore port

Red going river road and army
Road is for who rolls most 7s apparently
Yes the 6 wheat has really slowed him down
i do not know how you are worried about me
And if i had i would not trade it to you
Yet you have army and road all built on nbs
you playing with og whrn is the strongest here
Once the 7s dry out and he doesnt get nbs every orbit
of course ia m in last
Of course you are the worst type of catan player
Settle for nonbind well played black
I’m in last place and you have a sheep port
Oh I can give the ore
And give you insurance rn for the trouble
Or port wood if you need
Gimme a wood and port 2 wheat
Now we cant feed road to the only road comp
I’m in last I need a deal
I needed to play knight for pacing
Ill put it back if we survive
Any chance you can help me dev?
I have city anyways just so i dont waste cards
I have a wood you can port
We cant feed you road if you just win
hahh robbing me and blue on 9
If you have a knight oj red locked it
This is terrible for me but oj
My previous hand gave me a window this didnt
Had to help me port there black
But he didnt take it so all good i guess
play the mono and winn og
Oh i would if i had it
He can do it himself, goes to 9
